# Copilot Skills

This directory contains custom skills for GitHub Copilot to extend its capabilities for this project.

## Available Skills

- `troubleshoot.md` — Debug unexpected behavior using logs
- `agent-customization.md` — Create/update/fix agent customization files
- Additional skills as needed

## Using Skills

Skills are automatically discovered by Copilot in `.github/skills/` and are available for use throughout the repository.

Reference a skill in your prompt by name (e.g., "Use the troubleshoot skill to investigate this issue").
